# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Flexible Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_command:
        description: 'Custom shell command to run for the build process'
        required: true
        default: 'echo "No custom build command provided. Defaulting to a simple build..."; mkdir build && touch build/artifact.txt'
        type: string

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run custom build command
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.build_command }}

      - name: Verify build artifacts (optional)
        run: |
          if [ -d "build" ]; then
            echo "Build directory exists."
            ls -la build
          else
            echo "Build directory does not exist. Custom command might not have created it."
          fi
